TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Fa-tuo-muo-na, title = Fa-tuo-muo-na, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fa-tuo-muo-na} }

S.FORM: == Fa-tuo-muo-na Á≠Źť¶ĪśĎ©ťā£ == nganganŚźćÁ®Ī nisulitan i Fuo-cin tu ci Ni-kan-zuo-ti-ce, Ni-kan-tuo-ti-ce " hu-yi, Nirgrantha-j√ĪńĀniputra, pa-li-yi NigaŠĻáŠĻ≠ha-nńĀŠĻ≠aputta, In-tu kamu NiggaŠĻÉtha-nńĀyaputta", atu Ni-kan-ce. Ni-kan u kiwkay nida a ngangan, u li-si, w-si pangangan han u Zuo-ti-ce, tungus u Zuo-ti-secu "J√ĪńĀta, sipunuay" nilecuhan. Fa-tuo-muo-na naw Ni-kan-tuo-pay a bungsang, nikudan u ke-sin-ciaw-yi, mapatideng tu Ci-na-ciaw. :Nirgrantha-j√ĪńĀniputra,Ś∑īŚą©Ť™ě:NigaŠĻáŠĻ≠ha-nńĀŠĻ≠aputta,ŚćįŚļ¶šŅóŤ™ě:NiggaŠĻÉtha-nńĀyaputta), (J√ĪńĀta,śôļśÖß)ŚáļŤļę. . kaudipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Fa-tuo-muo-na a pilecuhan, yadah ku sananay a musakamu, tulu ku kakatinengan nu katuuday, pasu aydaay a Wa-yi-sa-li kin, Pi-ha-e-pan-cia-mu-yi, atu u Wan-se'-cen micapiay a Na-lan-tuo. duma Pi-ha-e-pan-cia-mu-yi u caynem kanatalan tawya culil tu matenesay a suo-tu Cun-se mibatad tu 45 kunli a Kung-de-cun. Fa-tuo-muo-na atu Se-cia-muo-ni malecad, u niyadu'ay nu tahuda a wawa, i kapahayay nu lumaan a maudip, ci ama nida u pacakayay tu tebus nu wancaw a Sa-ti-li, ngangan u Siddhartha, wina u Li-ce niyadu'ay a kuncu, ci Trishala. tulu a bataan ku mihcaan ni Fa-tuo-muo-na alesen nida ku zaysan nu luma', luma' " idaw ku acawa nida atu tataynaan a wawa" wicakuyca kapah ku liklik nu luma', paytem milaliw mikilim tu tatengaay a cudadan, mikilim tu hahanhanan a nipaelihan. nikudan nu sabaw tusa nu pankiwan, milauyd ci nida tu namakabalucuay a nisimsiman atu namaka labuay a nikatadikudan, sakikuday matineng tu ci nida tu kawaw " Kevala J√ĪńĀna", u sadikuday tu a nadatengan. ,ŚźćÁāļSiddhartha, Trishala. (Kevala J√ĪńĀna),šĻüŚįĪśėĮśúÄÁĶāÁöĄŚēüÁ§ļ. tu nikudan, cukaymasen nida ku sadikuday a nikaudip tu tulu a bataan nu nikaudipan nida tacuwacuwa musakamu tu sakatinengaw nu sakaytademaw, mamin tu culilan ku In-tu, pahetik tu nakamuan nida tu Ce-sye, mibelih tu Ceung nu kawawan, patideng tu sakakapah, mibelih tu sakayedes, caay pipatay tu tuud, caay palemang sa musakamu, caay piubi, caay pilebu tu tawan atu caay piwawies a lima ku nipatudu tu pabaway a sasakamuen. Fa-tuo-muo-na saan, sipakayda i nabalucuan atu nikadatengan nu udip mapanengil a tademaw, u nuheni u ci-na "jina", u talakaway, sa Ci-na-ciaw. šĻčŚĺĆ, . Fa-tuo-muo-na itida i Puo-puoe-cen " PńĀvńĀ, ayda ay a Puo-puoe-pu-li-cen" mapatay, kaudipan makaala tu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa, salacay nu dikucan saan itida ci nida i kun-yun nu ayawan tu limtu pic mihcaan mapatay, u ten-yi-pay saan u kunyun nu ayawan tu sipnem wal mihcaan. ci-na ciaw nu cudadan sakamusa ci nidaan tu nikapatayan caay namin kalecad, idaw ku musakamuay tu madayumay a sasakamuen, idaw ku sananay tu katuuday nu di'tuan atu kuo-wan milab utu tabakiay a lisinana. sakamusa jinasena a " Mahapurana", tayni milihida ku tapukuan a tademaw tu nipitademan nida. tin-yi-pay dayday a " Pravachanasara" kamu, kapatayan nida u kanus atu bukes ku liwan nida, udip nida mahida u dakes malabali. idaw ku nacudadan saan, ci Fa-tuo-muo-na pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa nu mihcaan nida sa, i enemay a demiadan misuayaw tu katuuday musakamu, mabi' namin ku katuuday , nengil sa nai' tu ci nida " u kanus atu bukes ku liwan, u mikilulay tu ci nidaan a tademawan tuduh hantu". Á≠Źť¶ĪśĎ©ťā£Śú®ś≥ĘŚ©ÜŚüé(PńĀvńĀ, . ś†ĻśďöJinasenaÁöĄ"Mahapurana", "Pravachanasara"Ť™™, . Sen-fa-tuo-muo-na yadah ku mikilulay ci nidaan, matinengay sabaw tu cacay, kapatayan satu, u In-de-la-pu-ti " IndrabhŇęti" atu Su-ta-muo "Sudharma" mitulinay midintu. (IndrabhŇęti)ŤąáŤėáťĀĒśĎ©(Sudharma)ÁĻľÁļĆŚā≥ťĀď. cudadan nu Fuo-ciawšĹõśēôŤ®ėŤľČ " cuo-a-han-cin. ni-kan-cin" nisulitan nida a su'-cuo-in-sye-suo, pasubana u ngelu' ku sapilawpes tu malumanay a kawawan, amica acaay picunus tu baluhay, anu kapah ku kawaw taneng miales, " mahida u ni-kan sa" ,mahida hinaadih, mahida hinasakamu, saan , caay kaw kakabiluan, idaw namin ku pisakawawan. anu idaw ku malumanay a kawawan, nikangelu'an lawpesatu, caay pisabaluhay tu kawaw, nai' tu ku laheci, anu nai' tu ku kawaw, mapatay nu ngelu', anu caay ka ngelu', halhal hank u ngelu'. " . "tawya, ci Se-li-ce, pasayda ci Ni-cin-tuo-sen-zuo-di-ce kitidaan, u salengacay sakamusa, saydan, uycanan ku zen-suo-cun-fali? hican mitulun ku mikilulay? sademiad han micuda a idaw tu ku'puc? patubeli ci Pi-se, " tay-ce, aku tu kaku sa, nisakakawawan mahida nikaadihan, mahida nakamuan, anu mahida ku tademaw, makaadih tu nikangelu'an a kawawan, sipakayda i tuas a nisakakawawan, u mangelu'ay ku kawaw, taneng milawpes tu kawaw, acaay pisabaluhay sikawaw, kinapataysa, nai' ku matinengay, hatida tu, mapatay tu, mapatay tu nu ngulu'."
S.PHON: == fa-tuo-muo-na **** == ŇčaŇčan** nisur~…ĺitan i fuo- ¶in tu ¶i ni-kan-zuo-ti- ¶…ô, ni-kan-tuo-ti- ¶…ô " ńßu-ji, nirgrantńßa-j**niputra, pa-r~…ĺi-ji niga**ńßa-n**aputta, in-tu kamu nigga*tńßa-n*japutta", atu ni-kan- ¶…ô. ni-kan u kiwkaj nida a ŇčaŇčan, u r~…ĺi-si, w-si paŇčaŇčan ńßan u zuo-ti- ¶…ô, tuŇčus u zuo-ti-s…ô ¶u "***ta, sipunuaj" nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. fa-tuo-muo-na naw ni-kan-tuo-paj a buŇčsaŇč, nikudan u k…ô-sin- ¶iaw-ji, mapatid…ôŇč tu ¶i-na- ¶iaw. :nirgrantńßa-j**niputra,***:niga**ńßa-n**aputta,****:nigga*tńßa-n*japutta), (***ta,**)**. . kaudipan** fa-tuo-muo-na a pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, jadańß ku sananaj a musakamu, tur~…ĺu ku kakatin…ôŇčan nu katuudaj, pasu ajdaaj a wa-ji-sa-r~…ĺi kin, pi-ńßa-…ô-pan- ¶ia-mu-ji, atu u wan-s…ô Ē~ °- ¶…ôn mi ¶apiaj a na-r~…ĺan-tuo. duma pi-ńßa-…ô-pan- ¶ia-mu-ji u ¶ajn…ôm kanatar~…ĺan tawja ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu mat…ôn…ôsaj a suo-tu ¶un-s…ô mibatad tu ** kunr~…ĺi a kuŇč-d…ô- ¶un. fa-tuo-muo-na atu s…ô- ¶ia-muo-ni mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, u nijadu Ē~ °aj nu tańßuda a wawa, i kapańßajaj nu r~…ĺumaan a maudip, ¶i ama nida u pa ¶akajaj tu t…ôbus nu wan ¶aw a sa-ti-r~…ĺi, ŇčaŇčan u siddńßartńßa, wina u r~…ĺi- ¶…ô nijadu Ē~ °aj a kun ¶u, ¶i trisńßar~…ĺa. tur~…ĺu a bataan ku mińß ¶aan ni fa-tuo-muo-na ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn nida ku zajsan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° " idaw ku a ¶awa nida atu tatajnaan a wawa" wi ¶akuj ¶a kapańß ku r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, pajt…ôm mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw mikir~…ĺim tu tat…ôŇčaaj a ¶udadan, mikir~…ĺim tu ńßańßanńßanan a nipa…ôr~…ĺińßan. nikudan nu sabaw tusa nu pankiwan, mir~…ĺaujd ¶i nida tu namakabar~…ĺu ¶uaj a nisimsiman atu namaka r~…ĺabuaj a nikatadikudan, sakikudaj matin…ôŇč tu ¶i nida tu kawaw " k…ô*ar~…ĺa ***na", u sadikudaj tu a nadat…ôŇčan. ,**siddńßartńßa, trisńßar~…ĺa. (k…ô*ar~…ĺa ***na),********. tu nikudan, ¶ukajmas…ôn nida ku sadikudaj a nikaudip tu tur~…ĺu a bataan nu nikaudipan nida ta ¶uwa ¶uwa musakamu tu sakatin…ôŇčaw nu sakajtad…ômaw, mamin tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan ku in-tu, pańß…ôtik tu nakamuan nida tu ¶…ô-sj…ô, mib…ôr~…ĺińß tu ¶…ôuŇč nu kawawan, patid…ôŇč tu sakakapańß, mib…ôr~…ĺińß tu sakaj…ôd…ôs, ¶aaj pipataj tu tuud, ¶aaj par~…ĺ…ômaŇč sa musakamu, ¶aaj piubi, ¶aaj pir~…ĺ…ôbu tu tawan atu ¶aaj piwawi…ôs a r~…ĺima ku nipatudu tu pabawaj a sasakamu…ôn. fa-tuo-muo-na saan, sipakajda i nabar~…ĺu ¶uan atu nikadat…ôŇčan nu udip mapan…ôŇčir~…ĺ a tad…ômaw, u nuńß…ôni u ¶i-na "jina", u tar~…ĺakawaj, sa ¶i-na- ¶iaw. **, . fa-tuo-muo-na itida i puo-puo…ô- ¶…ôn " p***, ajda aj a puo-puo…ô-pu-r~…ĺi- ¶…ôn" mapataj, kaudipan makaar~…ĺa tu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa, sar~…ĺa ¶aj nu diku ¶an saan itida ¶i nida i kun-jun nu ajawan tu r~…ĺimtu pi ¶ mińß ¶aan mapataj, u t…ôn-ji-paj saan u kunjun nu ajawan tu sipn…ôm war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan. ¶i-na ¶iaw nu ¶udadan sakamusa ¶i nidaan tu nikapatajan ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, idaw ku musakamuaj tu madajumaj a sasakamu…ôn, idaw ku sananaj tu katuudaj nu di Ē~ °tuan atu kuo-wan mir~…ĺab utu tabakiaj a r~…ĺisinana. sakamusa jinas…ôna a " mańßapurana", tajni mir~…ĺińßida ku tapukuan a tad…ômaw tu nipitad…ôman nida. tin-ji-paj dajdaj a " pra*a ¶ńßanasara" kamu, kapatajan nida u kanus atu buk…ôs ku r~…ĺiwan nida, udip nida mańßida u dak…ôs mar~…ĺabar~…ĺi. idaw ku na ¶udadan saan, ¶i fa-tuo-muo-na pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa nu mińß ¶aan nida sa, i …ôn…ômaj a d…ômiadan misuajaw tu katuudaj musakamu, mabi Ē~ ° namin ku katuudaj , n…ôŇčir~…ĺ sa nai Ē~ ° tu ¶i nida " u kanus atu buk…ôs ku r~…ĺiwan, u mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj tu ¶i nidaan a tad…ômawan tuduńß ńßantu". ********(p***, . ***inas…ôna*"mańßapurana", "pra*a ¶ńßanasara"*, . s…ôn-fa-tuo-muo-na jadańß ku mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj ¶i nidaan, matin…ôŇčaj sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj, kapatajan satu, u in-d…ô-r~…ĺa-pu-ti " indrabńß*ti" atu su-ta-muo "sudńßarma" mitur~…ĺinaj midintu. (indrabńß*ti)****(sudńßarma)****. ¶udadan nu fuo- ¶iaw**** " ¶uo-a-ńßan- ¶in. ni-kan- ¶in" nisur~…ĺitan nida a su Ē~ °- ¶uo-in-sj…ô-suo, pasubana u Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku sapir~…ĺawp…ôs tu mar~…ĺumanaj a kawawan, ami ¶a a ¶aaj pi ¶unus tu bar~…ĺuńßaj, anu kapańß ku kawaw tan…ôŇč miar~…ĺ…ôs, " mańßida u ni-kan sa" ,mańßida ńßinaadińß, mańßida ńßinasakamu, saan , ¶aaj kaw kakabir~…ĺuan, idaw namin ku pisakawawan. anu idaw ku mar~…ĺumanaj a kawawan, nikaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an r~…ĺawp…ôsatu, ¶aaj pisabar~…ĺuńßaj tu kawaw, nai Ē~ ° tu ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, anu nai Ē~ ° tu ku kawaw, mapataj nu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, anu ¶aaj ka Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, ńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ ńßank u Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °. " . "tawja, ¶i s…ô-r~…ĺi- ¶…ô, pasajda ¶i ni- ¶in-tuo-s…ôn-zuo-di- ¶…ô kitidaan, u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj sakamusa, sajdan, uj ¶anan ku z…ôn-suo- ¶un-far~…ĺi? ńßi ¶an mitur~…ĺun ku mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj? sad…ômiad ńßan mi ¶uda a idaw tu ku Ē~ °pu ¶? patub…ôr~…ĺi ¶i pi-s…ô, " taj- ¶…ô, aku tu kaku sa, nisakakawawan mańßida nikaadińßan, mańßida nakamuan, anu mańßida ku tad…ômaw, makaadińß tu nikaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an a kawawan, sipakajda i tuas a nisakakawawan, u maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj ku kawaw, tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu kawaw, a ¶aaj pisabar~…ĺuńßaj sikawaw, kinapatajsa, nai Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj, ńßatida tu, mapataj tu, mapataj tu nu Ňčur~…ĺu Ē~ °."
S.FORM: == Fa-tuo-muo-na Á≠Źť¶ĪśĎ©ťā£ == nganganŚźćÁ®Ī nisulitan i Fuo-cin tu ci Ni-kan-zuo-ti-ce, Ni-kan-tuo-ti-ce " hu-yi, Nirgrantha-j√ĪńĀniputra, pa-li-yi NigaŠĻáŠĻ≠ha-nńĀŠĻ≠aputta, In-tu kamu NiggaŠĻÉtha-nńĀyaputta", atu Ni-kan-ce. Ni-kan u kiwkay nida a ngangan, u li-si, w-si pangangan han u Zuo-ti-ce, tungus u Zuo-ti-secu "J√ĪńĀta, sipunuay" nilecuhan. Fa-tuo-muo-na naw Ni-kan-tuo-pay a bungsang, nikudan u ke-sin-ciaw-yi, mapatideng tu Ci-na-ciaw. :Nirgrantha-j√ĪńĀniputra,Ś∑īŚą©Ť™ě:NigaŠĻáŠĻ≠ha-nńĀŠĻ≠aputta,ŚćįŚļ¶šŅóŤ™ě:NiggaŠĻÉtha-nńĀyaputta), (J√ĪńĀta,śôļśÖß)ŚáļŤļę. . kaudipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Fa-tuo-muo-na a pilecuhan, yadah ku sananay a musakamu, tulu ku kakatinengan nu katuuday, pasu aydaay a Wa-yi-sa-li kin, Pi-ha-e-pan-cia-mu-yi, atu u Wan-se'-cen micapiay a Na-lan-tuo. duma Pi-ha-e-pan-cia-mu-yi u caynem kanatalan tawya culil tu matenesay a suo-tu Cun-se mibatad tu 45 kunli a Kung-de-cun. Fa-tuo-muo-na atu Se-cia-muo-ni malecad, u niyadu'ay nu tahuda a wawa, i kapahayay nu lumaan a maudip, ci ama nida u pacakayay tu tebus nu wancaw a Sa-ti-li, ngangan u Siddhartha, wina u Li-ce niyadu'ay a kuncu, ci Trishala. tulu a bataan ku mihcaan ni Fa-tuo-muo-na alesen nida ku zaysan nu luma', luma' " idaw ku acawa nida atu tataynaan a wawa" wicakuyca kapah ku liklik nu luma', paytem milaliw mikilim tu tatengaay a cudadan, mikilim tu hahanhanan a nipaelihan. nikudan nu sabaw tusa nu pankiwan, milauyd ci nida tu namakabalucuay a nisimsiman atu namaka labuay a nikatadikudan, sakikuday matineng tu ci nida tu kawaw " Kevala J√ĪńĀna", u sadikuday tu a nadatengan. ,ŚźćÁāļSiddhartha, Trishala. (Kevala J√ĪńĀna),šĻüŚįĪśėĮśúÄÁĶāÁöĄŚēüÁ§ļ. tu nikudan, cukaymasen nida ku sadikuday a nikaudip tu tulu a bataan nu nikaudipan nida tacuwacuwa musakamu tu sakatinengaw nu sakaytademaw, mamin tu culilan ku In-tu, pahetik tu nakamuan nida tu Ce-sye, mibelih tu Ceung nu kawawan, patideng tu sakakapah, mibelih tu sakayedes, caay pipatay tu tuud, caay palemang sa musakamu, caay piubi, caay pilebu tu tawan atu caay piwawies a lima ku nipatudu tu pabaway a sasakamuen. Fa-tuo-muo-na saan, sipakayda i nabalucuan atu nikadatengan nu udip mapanengil a tademaw, u nuheni u ci-na "jina", u talakaway, sa Ci-na-ciaw. šĻčŚĺĆ, . Fa-tuo-muo-na itida i Puo-puoe-cen " PńĀvńĀ, ayda ay a Puo-puoe-pu-li-cen" mapatay, kaudipan makaala tu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa, salacay nu dikucan saan itida ci nida i kun-yun nu ayawan tu limtu pic mihcaan mapatay, u ten-yi-pay saan u kunyun nu ayawan tu sipnem wal mihcaan. ci-na ciaw nu cudadan sakamusa ci nidaan tu nikapatayan caay namin kalecad, idaw ku musakamuay tu madayumay a sasakamuen, idaw ku sananay tu katuuday nu di'tuan atu kuo-wan milab utu tabakiay a lisinana. sakamusa jinasena a " Mahapurana", tayni milihida ku tapukuan a tademaw tu nipitademan nida. tin-yi-pay dayday a " Pravachanasara" kamu, kapatayan nida u kanus atu bukes ku liwan nida, udip nida mahida u dakes malabali. idaw ku nacudadan saan, ci Fa-tuo-muo-na pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa nu mihcaan nida sa, i enemay a demiadan misuayaw tu katuuday musakamu, mabi' namin ku katuuday , nengil sa nai' tu ci nida " u kanus atu bukes ku liwan, u mikilulay tu ci nidaan a tademawan tuduh hantu". Á≠Źť¶ĪśĎ©ťā£Śú®ś≥ĘŚ©ÜŚüé(PńĀvńĀ, . ś†ĻśďöJinasenaÁöĄ"Mahapurana", "Pravachanasara"Ť™™, . Sen-fa-tuo-muo-na yadah ku mikilulay ci nidaan, matinengay sabaw tu cacay, kapatayan satu, u In-de-la-pu-ti " IndrabhŇęti" atu Su-ta-muo "Sudharma" mitulinay midintu. (IndrabhŇęti)ŤąáŤėáťĀĒśĎ©(Sudharma)ÁĻľÁļĆŚā≥ťĀď. cudadan nu Fuo-ciawšĹõśēôŤ®ėŤľČ " cuo-a-han-cin. ni-kan-cin" nisulitan nida a su'-cuo-in-sye-suo, pasubana u ngelu' ku sapilawpes tu malumanay a kawawan, amica acaay picunus tu baluhay, anu kapah ku kawaw taneng miales, " mahida u ni-kan sa" ,mahida hinaadih, mahida hinasakamu, saan , caay kaw kakabiluan, idaw namin ku pisakawawan. anu idaw ku malumanay a kawawan, nikangelu'an lawpesatu, caay pisabaluhay tu kawaw, nai' tu ku laheci, anu nai' tu ku kawaw, mapatay nu ngelu', anu caay ka ngelu', halhal hank u ngelu'. " . "tawya, ci Se-li-ce, pasayda ci Ni-cin-tuo-sen-zuo-di-ce kitidaan, u salengacay sakamusa, saydan, uycanan ku zen-suo-cun-fali? hican mitulun ku mikilulay? sademiad han micuda a idaw tu ku'puc? patubeli ci Pi-se, " tay-ce, aku tu kaku sa, nisakakawawan mahida nikaadihan, mahida nakamuan, anu mahida ku tademaw, makaadih tu nikangelu'an a kawawan, sipakayda i tuas a nisakakawawan, u mangelu'ay ku kawaw, taneng milawpes tu kawaw, acaay pisabaluhay sikawaw, kinapataysa, nai' ku matinengay, hatida tu, mapatay tu, mapatay tu nu ngulu'."
S.PHON: == fa-tuo-muo-na **** == ŇčaŇčan** nisur~…ĺitan i fuo- ¶in tu ¶i ni-kan-zuo-ti- ¶…ô, ni-kan-tuo-ti- ¶…ô " ńßu-ji, nirgrantńßa-j**niputra, pa-r~…ĺi-ji niga**ńßa-n**aputta, in-tu kamu nigga*tńßa-n*japutta", atu ni-kan- ¶…ô. ni-kan u kiwkaj nida a ŇčaŇčan, u r~…ĺi-si, w-si paŇčaŇčan ńßan u zuo-ti- ¶…ô, tuŇčus u zuo-ti-s…ô ¶u "***ta, sipunuaj" nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. fa-tuo-muo-na naw ni-kan-tuo-paj a buŇčsaŇč, nikudan u k…ô-sin- ¶iaw-ji, mapatid…ôŇč tu ¶i-na- ¶iaw. :nirgrantńßa-j**niputra,***:niga**ńßa-n**aputta,****:nigga*tńßa-n*japutta), (***ta,**)**. . kaudipan** fa-tuo-muo-na a pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, jadańß ku sananaj a musakamu, tur~…ĺu ku kakatin…ôŇčan nu katuudaj, pasu ajdaaj a wa-ji-sa-r~…ĺi kin, pi-ńßa-…ô-pan- ¶ia-mu-ji, atu u wan-s…ô Ē~ °- ¶…ôn mi ¶apiaj a na-r~…ĺan-tuo. duma pi-ńßa-…ô-pan- ¶ia-mu-ji u ¶ajn…ôm kanatar~…ĺan tawja ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu mat…ôn…ôsaj a suo-tu ¶un-s…ô mibatad tu ** kunr~…ĺi a kuŇč-d…ô- ¶un. fa-tuo-muo-na atu s…ô- ¶ia-muo-ni mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, u nijadu Ē~ °aj nu tańßuda a wawa, i kapańßajaj nu r~…ĺumaan a maudip, ¶i ama nida u pa ¶akajaj tu t…ôbus nu wan ¶aw a sa-ti-r~…ĺi, ŇčaŇčan u siddńßartńßa, wina u r~…ĺi- ¶…ô nijadu Ē~ °aj a kun ¶u, ¶i trisńßar~…ĺa. tur~…ĺu a bataan ku mińß ¶aan ni fa-tuo-muo-na ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn nida ku zajsan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° " idaw ku a ¶awa nida atu tatajnaan a wawa" wi ¶akuj ¶a kapańß ku r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, pajt…ôm mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw mikir~…ĺim tu tat…ôŇčaaj a ¶udadan, mikir~…ĺim tu ńßańßanńßanan a nipa…ôr~…ĺińßan. nikudan nu sabaw tusa nu pankiwan, mir~…ĺaujd ¶i nida tu namakabar~…ĺu ¶uaj a nisimsiman atu namaka r~…ĺabuaj a nikatadikudan, sakikudaj matin…ôŇč tu ¶i nida tu kawaw " k…ô*ar~…ĺa ***na", u sadikudaj tu a nadat…ôŇčan. ,**siddńßartńßa, trisńßar~…ĺa. (k…ô*ar~…ĺa ***na),********. tu nikudan, ¶ukajmas…ôn nida ku sadikudaj a nikaudip tu tur~…ĺu a bataan nu nikaudipan nida ta ¶uwa ¶uwa musakamu tu sakatin…ôŇčaw nu sakajtad…ômaw, mamin tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan ku in-tu, pańß…ôtik tu nakamuan nida tu ¶…ô-sj…ô, mib…ôr~…ĺińß tu ¶…ôuŇč nu kawawan, patid…ôŇč tu sakakapańß, mib…ôr~…ĺińß tu sakaj…ôd…ôs, ¶aaj pipataj tu tuud, ¶aaj par~…ĺ…ômaŇč sa musakamu, ¶aaj piubi, ¶aaj pir~…ĺ…ôbu tu tawan atu ¶aaj piwawi…ôs a r~…ĺima ku nipatudu tu pabawaj a sasakamu…ôn. fa-tuo-muo-na saan, sipakajda i nabar~…ĺu ¶uan atu nikadat…ôŇčan nu udip mapan…ôŇčir~…ĺ a tad…ômaw, u nuńß…ôni u ¶i-na "jina", u tar~…ĺakawaj, sa ¶i-na- ¶iaw. **, . fa-tuo-muo-na itida i puo-puo…ô- ¶…ôn " p***, ajda aj a puo-puo…ô-pu-r~…ĺi- ¶…ôn" mapataj, kaudipan makaar~…ĺa tu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa, sar~…ĺa ¶aj nu diku ¶an saan itida ¶i nida i kun-jun nu ajawan tu r~…ĺimtu pi ¶ mińß ¶aan mapataj, u t…ôn-ji-paj saan u kunjun nu ajawan tu sipn…ôm war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan. ¶i-na ¶iaw nu ¶udadan sakamusa ¶i nidaan tu nikapatajan ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, idaw ku musakamuaj tu madajumaj a sasakamu…ôn, idaw ku sananaj tu katuudaj nu di Ē~ °tuan atu kuo-wan mir~…ĺab utu tabakiaj a r~…ĺisinana. sakamusa jinas…ôna a " mańßapurana", tajni mir~…ĺińßida ku tapukuan a tad…ômaw tu nipitad…ôman nida. tin-ji-paj dajdaj a " pra*a ¶ńßanasara" kamu, kapatajan nida u kanus atu buk…ôs ku r~…ĺiwan nida, udip nida mańßida u dak…ôs mar~…ĺabar~…ĺi. idaw ku na ¶udadan saan, ¶i fa-tuo-muo-na pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa nu mińß ¶aan nida sa, i …ôn…ômaj a d…ômiadan misuajaw tu katuudaj musakamu, mabi Ē~ ° namin ku katuudaj , n…ôŇčir~…ĺ sa nai Ē~ ° tu ¶i nida " u kanus atu buk…ôs ku r~…ĺiwan, u mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj tu ¶i nidaan a tad…ômawan tuduńß ńßantu". ********(p***, . ***inas…ôna*"mańßapurana", "pra*a ¶ńßanasara"*, . s…ôn-fa-tuo-muo-na jadańß ku mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj ¶i nidaan, matin…ôŇčaj sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj, kapatajan satu, u in-d…ô-r~…ĺa-pu-ti " indrabńß*ti" atu su-ta-muo "sudńßarma" mitur~…ĺinaj midintu. (indrabńß*ti)****(sudńßarma)****. ¶udadan nu fuo- ¶iaw**** " ¶uo-a-ńßan- ¶in. ni-kan- ¶in" nisur~…ĺitan nida a su Ē~ °- ¶uo-in-sj…ô-suo, pasubana u Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku sapir~…ĺawp…ôs tu mar~…ĺumanaj a kawawan, ami ¶a a ¶aaj pi ¶unus tu bar~…ĺuńßaj, anu kapańß ku kawaw tan…ôŇč miar~…ĺ…ôs, " mańßida u ni-kan sa" ,mańßida ńßinaadińß, mańßida ńßinasakamu, saan , ¶aaj kaw kakabir~…ĺuan, idaw namin ku pisakawawan. anu idaw ku mar~…ĺumanaj a kawawan, nikaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an r~…ĺawp…ôsatu, ¶aaj pisabar~…ĺuńßaj tu kawaw, nai Ē~ ° tu ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, anu nai Ē~ ° tu ku kawaw, mapataj nu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, anu ¶aaj ka Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, ńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ ńßank u Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °. " . "tawja, ¶i s…ô-r~…ĺi- ¶…ô, pasajda ¶i ni- ¶in-tuo-s…ôn-zuo-di- ¶…ô kitidaan, u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj sakamusa, sajdan, uj ¶anan ku z…ôn-suo- ¶un-far~…ĺi? ńßi ¶an mitur~…ĺun ku mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj? sad…ômiad ńßan mi ¶uda a idaw tu ku Ē~ °pu ¶? patub…ôr~…ĺi ¶i pi-s…ô, " taj- ¶…ô, aku tu kaku sa, nisakakawawan mańßida nikaadińßan, mańßida nakamuan, anu mańßida ku tad…ômaw, makaadińß tu nikaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an a kawawan, sipakajda i tuas a nisakakawawan, u maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj ku kawaw, tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu kawaw, a ¶aaj pisabar~…ĺuńßaj sikawaw, kinapatajsa, nai Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj, ńßatida tu, mapataj tu, mapataj tu nu Ňčur~…ĺu Ē~ °."
